race.comment: COMMANDORO (10) resumes after running some good races in similar grade here last time in. Back without a trial and gets in light Quince's 2kg claim. Can make his presence felt from the draw. NABHA (8) is improving with racing and has her hoof on the till third-up. Held a forward position and never surrendered to secure second over 1080m at Canberra Acton. Value player. ABSTRUSE (2) underrated mare who finds a winnable race first-up. Anchored with the 60.5kg last start with a fast finishing third over 1000m at Wagga on February 28. Fitted with the one trial here over 920m. Worth thought. DER BLAUE REITER (3) resumes from a lengthy break. Big jump in class with a fighting on-pace third over 1000m at Hawkesbury in C1 grade last February. Has a good fresh record and worth thought from the draw.
